headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says Iran Deal Announcement 'Shortly' With Hormuz 'Opened'; Tesla, AI Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points
summary: The stock market rebounded for solid weekly gains on Iran deal hopes, with talks continuing over the weekend. Tesla is near a buy point along with ASML and several other AI stocks.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points

headline: How Nvidia’s US$3.2 Billion AI Optics Pact At Corning (GLW) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Nvidia recently agreed to invest up to US$3.20 billion in Corning through a warrant deal to expand Corning’s U.S. optical connectivity manufacturing capacity for AI data centers, deepening their collaboration on scaling high‑performance optical solutions. This partnership effectively positions Corning as a core supplier at the physical layer of AI infrastructure, tying its long-term prospects more closely to the buildout of next‑generation data centers. We’ll now examine how Nvidia’s...
